geography.data_source: KMDA (Kolkata Metropolitan Development Authority) peri-urban zone, North 24 Parganas district fringe municipalities

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 North 24 Parganas district tables (fringe municipalities), rapid growth at 4.5% CAGR from Kolkata urban spillover

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) West Bengal peri-urban tables, Census 2011 village-level occupation data, PLFS 2022-23, fish market activity from Bengal's fishing community data

commute_profile.data_source: Eastern Railway suburban section data for Sealdah-Barrackpore/Kalyani lines, no metro coverage in peri-urban zone, very long commutes

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from low-income peri-urban zone, highest fare sensitivity in Kolkata metro area, high political mobilisation characteristic of Bengal but slower information diffusion in sprawl

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban social patterns — village kinship networks with strong political party (TMC/CPIM) cadre overlay, very high clustering

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from suburban rail station area market activity, fringe municipality station bazaars
Estimated from Bengal's fish market network in peri-urban areas, fishing community employment
Estimated from construction labour gathering points on arterial roads near peri-urban Kolkata

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Periurban/Low Connectivity template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable to North 24 Parganas fringe

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban governance — mix of municipality and panchayat, very strong TMC/CPIM party cadre presence at village level, Bengal's unique political penetration to rural/peri-urban level
